mapper.select: select fid, cid, fname, parent_fid as parentFid, fsort from resource_folder where cid = #{cid} order by fsort asc, fid asc
mapper.insert: insert into resource_folder (fid, cid, fname, parent_fid, fsort) values (#{fid}, #{cid}, #{fname}, #{parent_fid}, #{fsort})
mapper.update: update resource_folder set fname = #{fname} where fid = #{fid}
update resource_folder set parent_fid = #{parent_fid} where fid = #{fid}
update resource_folder set fsort = #{fsort} where fid = #{fid}
update resource_folder set parent_fid = #{new_parent} where parent_fid = #{old_parent}
